message:
Command `# Check if process made any recent progress
sleep 300
cat /proc/625425/stat 2>/dev/null | awk '{print "utime:", $14/100}' || echo "PROCESS ENDED"
cat /proc/625425/io 2>/dev/null | grep "^rchar"
ls /proc/625425/fd/ 2>/dev/null | wc -l` executed with exit code 0.
